title: Truthful
description: A pack that doubles the resolutions while staying true to the vanilla look of Minecraft.
body:
![Truthful logo](https://imgur.com/AIzxWal.png)

## _The resource pack that stays true to the spirit of Minecraft_

Do you want a resource pack that upgrades the Minecraft's textures to 32x without being too far from their 16x form? Well that's exactly what Truthful is.
This resource pack is very close to the basic look of the game, even more than Faithful. For exemple if a line is 1 pixel wide in default it will be 2 pixels wide in Truthful while in Faithul it will be 1 pixel wide.

![Comparaison between vanilla and Truthful](https://imgur.com/DVQqR0q.png)



Current progress:
- Blocks 63% (692/1083)
- Entities 31% (181/577)
- Items 91% (682/747)
- Mob effects 100% (39/39)
- Particles 69% (175/253)
- Paintings 11% (6/52)
- Trims 0% (0/40)
- GUI 85% (444/519)

Total 67% (2219/3310)

### **See this pack on other websites**


[PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/truthful/)

[Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/truthful)

Textures made by me.
Additional credit:
Custom stairs models from "No Cut Stairs" by Clooless: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/no-cut-stairs/
Fonts from "Smoother Font" from "Vanilla Tweaks": https://vanillatweaks.net/


This pack is incomplete. I am still making it even if I don't update it frequently.
